goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'arbury lodge guesthouse'.
Make sure you get 'star of the hotel' and 'address'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should depart from 'stevenage'.
The train should leave on 'friday' and should 'leave after 12:45'.
Make sure you get 'train ID', 'price', and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.
